name: Cloud KMS key does not have automatic rotation enabled
description: A Cloud KMS symmetric encryption key does not have an automatic rotation period configured. Without rotation, a compromised key material remains valid indefinitely. Regular key rotation limits the amount of data encrypted with a single key version and reduces the impact of key compromise.
remediation: Enable automatic rotation on the key: Cloud Console → KMS → Key ring → Key → Edit → Rotation period → Set to 90 days (recommended). Or via CLI: gcloud kms keys update KEY --keyring=KEYRING --location=LOCATION --next-rotation-time=DATE --rotation-period=90d. For asymmetric keys, rotation must be performed manually by creating a new key version.
